---
title: "CLIF ICU Dashboard"
format: 
  html:
    theme: sandstone
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
    html-math-method: katex
    html: 
      allow-raw-html: true
execute:
  enabled: true
  freeze: auto
  echo: false
---


# ICU Patient Encounter Characteristics and Outcomes (2020–2021)

The table below showcases the characteristics and outcomes of ICU patient encounters across nine CLIF consortium sites. The cohort includes all adults (≥ 18 years) admitted to an ICU within 48 hours of hospitalization and staying at least 24 hours, from January 1, 2020, to December 31, 2021. This represents a diverse cohort of over 111,000 ICU patient encounters.

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go

# Map marker data with scroll targets
df = pd.DataFrame([
    {"University": "Emory University", "Lat": 33.7925, "Lon": -84.3238, "Target": "emory-university"},
    {"University": "Johns Hopkins", "Lat": 39.2976, "Lon": -76.5920, "Target": "johns-hopkins"},
    {"University": "Northwestern", "Lat": 41.8781, "Lon": -87.6298, "Target": "northwestern"},
    {"University": "OHSU", "Lat": 45.4995, "Lon": -122.6868, "Target": "ohsu"},
    {"University": "Rush University", "Lat": 41.8749, "Lon": -87.6691, "Target": "rush-university"},
    {"University": "University of Chicago", "Lat": 41.7897, "Lon": -87.5997, "Target": "university-of-chicago"},
    {"University": "University of Michigan", "Lat": 42.2780, "Lon": -83.7382, "Target": "university-of-michigan"},
    {"University": "University of Minnesota", "Lat": 44.9727, "Lon": -93.2354, "Target": "university-of-minnesota"},
    {"University": "University of Pennsylvania", "Lat": 39.9522, "Lon": -75.1932, "Target": "university-of-pennsylvania"},
])

fig = go.Figure(go.Scattergeo(
    locationmode='USA-states',
    lon=df["Lon"],
    lat=df["Lat"],
    text=df["University"],
    mode='markers+text',
    textposition='top center',
    marker=dict(size=10, color="#0047AB", line=dict(width=1, color='white')),
    hoverinfo='text',
    customdata=df["Target"]
))

fig.update_layout(
    title="CLIF ICU Sites (Click a marker for stats)",
    geo=dict(
        scope='usa',
        projection=go.layout.geo.Projection(type='albers usa'),
        showland=True,
        landcolor="lightgray",
        bgcolor="white",
        showcountries=False,
        showframe=False
    ),
    margin=dict(l=0, r=0, t=40, b=0)
)

fig.show()
```

<details id="emory-university">
<summary><strong>Emory University</strong></summary>
<div class="stat-grid">
<div class="stat">
<img src="images/emory-total-encounters.png" alt="Total encounters icon">
<div class="stat-value">84,106</div>
<div class="stat-label">Total encounters</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<img src="images/median_age.png" alt="Median age icon">
<div class="stat-value">63 years</div>
<div class="stat-label">Median age</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<img src="images/median_age.png" alt="x icon">
<div class="stat-value">39.7%</div>
<div class="stat-label">Female</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<img src="images/median_age.png" alt="y icon">
<div class="stat-value">6%</div>
<div class="stat-label">Hispanic</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<img src="images/median_age.png" alt="z icon">
<div class="stat-value">61.5%</div>
<div class="stat-label">White</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<img src="images/median_age.png" alt="a icon">
<div class="stat-value">26%</div>
<div class="stat-label">Mortality</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<img src="images/median_age.png" alt="b icon">
<div class="stat-value">65%</div>
<div class="stat-label">Received vasopressors</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<img src="images/median_age.png" alt="c icon">
<div class="stat-value">0.3 [0.3–0.5]</div>
<div class="stat-label">FIO2</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<img src="images/median_age.png" alt="d icon">
<div class="stat-value">5 [5–7.4]</div>
<div class="stat-label">PEEP</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<img src="images/median_age.png" alt="e icon">
<div class="stat-value">7 [3–10]</div>
<div class="stat-label">SOFA Score</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<img src="images/median_age.png" alt="f icon">
<div class="stat-value">80.5%</div>
<div class="stat-label">ICU Intubation</div>
</div>
</div>
</details>


<details id="johns-hopkins">
<summary><strong>Johns Hopkins</strong></summary>
<div class="stat-grid">
<div class="stat">
<div class="stat-value">18,242</div>
<div class="stat-label">Total encounters</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<div class="stat-value">62 years</div>
<div class="stat-label">Median age</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<div class="stat-value">45.6%</div>
<div class="stat-label">Female</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<div class="stat-value">56.2%</div>
<div class="stat-label">White</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<div class="stat-value">6.0%</div>
<div class="stat-label">Hispanic</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<div class="stat-value">10.4%</div>
<div class="stat-label">Mortality</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<div class="stat-value">60%</div>
<div class="stat-label">Received vasopressors</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<div class="stat-value">0.4 [0.3–0.6]</div>
<div class="stat-label">FIO2</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<div class="stat-value">5 [5–8]</div>
<div class="stat-label">PEEP</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<div class="stat-value">6 [3–9]</div>
<div class="stat-label">SOFA Score</div>
</div>
<div class="stat">
<div class="stat-value">75.2%</div>
<div class="stat-label">ICU Intubation</div>
</div>
</div>
</details>

<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    // Wait for Plotly to be fully loaded
    const checkPlotly = setInterval(function() {
      const plot = document.querySelector(".js-plotly-plot");
      if (plot) {
        clearInterval(checkPlotly);
        
        plot.on('plotly_click', function(eventData) {
          console.log('Plot clicked:', eventData); // Debug log
          const anchorId = eventData.points[0].customdata;
          console.log('Target ID:', anchorId); // Debug log
          
          // Close all other details sections
          document.querySelectorAll('details').forEach(detail => {
            detail.open = false;
          });
          
          const el = document.getElementById(anchorId);
          console.log('Found element:', el); // Debug log
          
          if (el) {
            // Open the details element
            el.open = true;
            
            // Scroll into view
            el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
            
            // Add flash highlight
            el.classList.add('flash-highlight');
            
            // Remove highlight after animation
            setTimeout(() => {
              el.classList.remove('flash-highlight');
            }, 1000);
          }
        });
      }
    }, 100);
  });
</script>
